# Sample OKF Bundle

A small, conformant Open Knowledge Format bundle used as a fixture for the
`okf` adapter. This reserved `index.md` carries NO frontmatter and is a
progressive-disclosure listing, never indexed as a concept.

## Tables

* [Orders](/tables/orders.md) - One row per completed customer order.
* [Customers](/tables/customers.md) - One row per customer account.

## Metrics

* [Weekly Active Users](/metrics/wau.md) - Distinct users active in a 7-day window.

## Guides

* [Onboarding](/guides/onboarding.md) - How to get started with the sales bundle.
